settings.cart_intro: Invite-only controlled pilot cart shell — not a public launch. Line items are illustrative; checkout and payments stay disabled until separately approved.
settings.empty_description: The empty-cart experience is now in place, but live cart items, totals, and checkout behaviour remain intentionally deferred until a later approved slice.
settings.support_copy: This invite-only pilot is not full customer operations. Delivery and returns will be confirmed before launch or before any fulfilment; no seven-day service commitment is implied.
